game.short_text: Your step to die
game.title: I Checkmate Thee

details.title: I Checkmate Thee
details.description:
Игра-работа Практикума ГБ приняла участие в:
GameJam Game Off 2024 (3rd: https://itch.io/jam/game-off-2024/results )
GameJam GameBox training workshop (Horror)
Четвертый конкурс разработчиков видеоигр ИГРОПРОМ 2025
(лучшие результаты: #5 выбор игроков, #8 выбор участников - демо в Steam)

Актуальная игра в Steam

Game in Steam
Прямая ссылка:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/3703300/I_Checkmate_Thee/
Прототип онлайн-версии на Itch
Прямая ссылка:https://sergolek.itch.io/i-checkmate-thee-online
***
         РУССКАЯ ЛОКАЛИЗАЦИЯ:

    

СЕКРЕТЫ

    
Кто играет против меня?
    
Как выбраться отсюда?
    
Что здесь произошло?
    
Это игра или жизнь?
    
Почему ты здесь?
    
Кто ты?
    

ОБ ИГРЕ
    
Чёрные и белые клетки посреди ничего. Жуткие рыки,  завывания, и чьи-то мерцающие глаза во тьме. Ты не помнишь, кто ты и как  ты здесь оказался. Вокруг лишь бесконечный кошмар, повторяющийся из  раза в раз: ты один на шахматной доске против всех фигур.
    
Сможешь ли ты добраться до противоположного края доски и раскрыть тайну произошедшего?
    
Сыграй эту партию до конца, не дай поставить себе мат!
    
Твой шаг навстречу смерти!

    
Я ставлю мат тебе!
    

ПОДСКАЗКА
    
Управление - ЛКМ - атака и сбор свитков / ПКМ - ход по клеткам / Клавиша ESC - выход в Меню.
    
Пешка - ходит на одну клетку вперед / атакует на одну клетку по диагонали. Придя на последнюю клетку - заменяется старшею фигурой.
    
Ладья - ходит и атакует по клеткам вперед и назад, влево и вправо.
    
Епископ - ходит и атакует по клеткам по диагонали.
    
Королева - ходит и атакует по клеткам по диагонали, вперед и назад, влево и вправо.
    
Конь - ходит и атакует по клеткам Г-образно.
    
Колонна - Коли скрылся свет во тьме - значит, смерть пришла к тебе.
    
Меч - убивает врагов около тебя.
    
Свиток - Познай самого себя.
    
        
ПЕРСОНАЖ       
Вы ходите и атакуете на одну клетку по диагонали, вперед и назад, влево и вправо
    
        
ТИТР правовой       
Звуки бесплатные с сайтов: pixabay.com , zvukipro.com , zvukogram.com       
Шрифты титульный - авторский, разработан специально для данной игры; текстовый авторский в разработке, в билде 28.02.2025 используется разрешенный для коммерческого использования (SIL OFL 1.1): Ebbe

КОМАНДА
    
UE: Александр Осипов, Павел Тесленко 

2D-арт: Виктория Макаева (концепт-арт в бета-версии игры)
    
3D-арт: Арсений Костин (персонажи, окружение, мастер-арт), Турал Сулейманов (персонажи, окружение, мастер-арт), Никита Завирюха (персонажи, окружение)
    
Аниматор / VFX: Дмитрий Мурин
    
Видео-продакшен: Станислав Голубинский
    
Нарратив: Алексей Скорняков
    
Геймдизайн: Сергей Олексюк
    
Наставник: Мария Елена Метлова (Малена Метлова)
    
Форум в сообществе
    
Рады вашим комментариям!

    

***
    

         ENGLISH LOCALIZATION:       




    
Who's playing against me?
    
How to get out of here?
    
What happened here?
    
Is it a game or a life?
    
Why are you here?
Who are you?


Black and white squares in the middle of nowhere. Eerie roars, howls, and someone's flickering eyes in the darkness. You don't remember who you are or how you got here. All around you is a never ending nightmare, repeating itself over and over again: you alone on a chessboard against all the pieces.
Can you reach the other side of the board and uncover the secret of what happened?
Play this game to the end, don't let yourself be checkmated!
Your step to die!
I Checkmate Thee!


Control - LBM - attack and keep scrolls / RBM - move to a square / ESC - exit to the Menu.
Pawn - it can only move forward / it can attack by moving one square  diagonally. If is moved to its last rank - replaces with a senior chess  piece.
    
Rook - it can move and attack any number of squares, up and down and side to side.
    
Bishop - it can move and attack any number of squares diagonally.
    
Queen - it can move and attack any number of squares diagonally, up and down and  side to side.
    
Knight - it can move and attack in an L-shape.
Column - if it no light - it was you died.
Sword - It kill enemies around you.
Scrolls - Nosce te ipsum.


You can move and attack one square diagonally, up and down and side to side.


Sounds free / non commercial license from sites: pixabay.com , zvukipro.com , zvukogram.com
Fonts main - for original in game / text in game license SIL OFL 1.1: Ebbe


UE: 
         Aliaksandr Osipau, Pavel Teslenko 
2D-art:
        Viktoriya Makaeva (concept-art for beta-version game)
3D-art:
          Arseniy Kostin (character, environment, master-art), 
         Tural Suleymanov (characters, environment, master-art),
          Nikita Zaviryukha (characters, environment)
Animator / VFX: 
         Dmitry Murin
Video-prod: 
         Stanislav Golubinskiy
Narrative:
         Aleksey Skornyakov

Gamedesign: 
         Sergey Oleksyuk

Mentor:
         Mariya Elena Metlova (Malena Metlova)

We welcome your comments!Скачайте архив-файл на свой компьютер и распакуйте его (архив не запароленный). Внутри папки файл запуска игры  I_Checkmate_Thee.exe (если ваш антивирус будет ругаться на файл - игнорируйте, в игре вирусов нет).
Играйте с ужасным удовольствием!

***
Download the zip file and unzip it to your computer. The game launch  file is in the folder: I_Checkmate_Thee.exe (if your antivirus swears at  the file, ignore it, there are no viruses in the game)
  
Play with horror-pleasure!

game.title: The Trial of Wasdo
game.short_text: Master spells, solve puzzles, and face the magical trial of Wasdo !

details.title: The Trial of Wasdo
details.description:
The Trial of Wasdo is a tile based puzzle game about using your movement to cast spells.
Guided by enigmatic wizard mentors, each with their own secrets, you’ll uncover the hidden truths of a magical world. Draw your destiny on the ground, conjure and destroy, and overcome challenges where every line you trace shapes your fate. 
Are you ready to face Wasdo’s trial and claim your place among the worthy?

Made during in a month for Github's Game off 2024 (theme: Secrets)
Github repo
Recipe
Engine Godot
Art Procreate + Photoshop   

Audio Logic Pro X + Reaper
Credits
Programming, level design and art by aznoqmous
Killer soundtrack and sound effects by Jérémie Frémont

game.title: Shuffle Macabre
game.short_text: A procedural series of murder mysteries where one of the cards you're dealt is the killer!

details.title: Shuffle Macabre
details.description:
You are an undercover detective attending fancy parties held by monsters. You know there's a killer on the loose. And you know how to stop them.
- Click the lightbulb to turn off the lights
- Use deductive reasoning to solve randomly generated puzzles!
- Enjoy a soothing original jazz score!
- Bring these murdering fiends to justice!
---- CONTROLS ----
Right click guests to toggle their suspicion symbol (for your convenience)
Click and drag Kevlar onto guests to prevent them from from the killer's next attack
(Windows only) F to toggle fullscreen
Windows version is more stable than web version, recommended for the best experience.

game.title: Assassination Prevention Association
game.short_text: Save lives by figuring out who is the assassin!

details.title: Assassination Prevention Association
details.description:
You are being shown videos of the future, of people moments before they are assassinated.
The only way to save their lives is to study the video and figure out who the would-be assassin is.

This game was a solo project made for the game jam "Game Off 2024", with the theme of "Secret".
It's a bit strange, but I am happy that I made it work. Hope you enjoy!

game.title: Bloody Delicious
game.short_text: Special burgers - you'll lick your fingers!

details.title: Bloody Delicious
details.description:
WASD - Movement
E - Take

G - Put
Take the order from the visitor(Е). The recipe for the dish to be cooked will appear on the right. 
Pay attention to the timer in the upper right corner, it shows how long the visitor is ready to wait for his order. Don't miss your chance to feed your guest a delicious bugrer!
The assembly of the burger(E) starts from the bottom! 
To observe the sequence of ingredients put the bottom bun-cutlet on a plate-...-top bun. 
Do not forget to fry the buns and cutlet to a crust! 
The assembled burger should be placed on a tray and given to the customer. 
Also, do not forget to replenish the products in the trays from the warehouse.





Welcome to "Bloody Delicious", where the burgers are juicy, the customers are strange, and the secrets are... downright horrifying.
You’re the newest employee at a small-town burger joint that prides itself on quality meat and customer satisfaction. But as you take orders and grill patties, things start to feel... off.

Before you know it, the routine spirals into a waking nightmare. Strange orders, eerie recepies, and hallucinations begin to blur the line between reality and delusion. Something dark and forbidden hides in the corners of the restaurant, daring you to uncover a dark secret.

Mikhail Bochkarev

game.title: Messenger Mouse
game.short_text: Deliver the message! Save the kingdom!

details.title: Messenger Mouse
details.description:
Messenger Mouse
Take on the role of a courageous mouse tasked with delivering a secret message to the king in Messenger Mouse! This action-packed platformer combines classic gameplay with modern challenges, encouraging players to explore, strategize, and uncover the game's many secrets.
Originally developed for the Game Off 2024 game jam, the team has decided to continue developing this into a full release. Release date TBD.
Follow the game here or Subscribe to our newsletter to be kept up-to-date on progress: https://www.troystorygames.com/newsletter/  
Controller recommended (download and play)!!Steam Deck Supported!!
Features:
Hidden Passages: Discover secret paths and shortcuts hidden throughout the levels.Dynamic Movement: Jump, double jump, and attack your way through challenging obstacles.Ghost Race Mode: Your best times are saved for each level. Race your best ghosts or race the developer ghosts to hone your skills. Challenge Mode: Play through 50 of the toughest challenges we could craft. Each challenge tests movement mastery! Good luck!Cheat Codes: Unlock hidden surprises with classic cheat code combos found in secret areas throughout the levels.
Do you have what it takes to deliver the message in time and unravel the secrets of the kingdom? Find out in Messenger Mouse!
Download now or play in the browser and start your secret mission!
Team
Lead Designer: Travis ConstantinoLead Developer: Sean LaPlanteLead Artist: Kayla LaPlante
Additional Credits
 Font: https://somepx.itch.io/ - "Lookout 7" and "Sins 7" Level Assets: Some fully Custom and some remastering/changes to Kenney assetsSound Effects: GameBurp - 2000 Game Sound FX - All Sound FXBeacon light sound effect: Shield Pickup (from OGG CasualSounds)Full sword bard sound effect: Powerup 47 (from https://gamesupply.itch.io/1000-nintendo-sound-effects)Ambient battle noise (intro cutscene): swords and shouting by pfranzen -- https://freesound.org/s/192072/ -- License: Attribution 4.0Menu Music: https://opengameart.org/content/boundlessIntro Cutscene Music: Drama - https://opengameart.org/content/cc0-scrapsLevel 00 Music (tutorial): TODOLevel 01 Music: - new thing - https://opengameart.org/content/cc0-scrapsLevel 02 Music: - fairy adventure - https://opengameart.org/content/fairy-adventureLevel 03 Music: - game - Track 01 (title screen) - https://opengameart.org/content/cc0-scrapsLevel 05 Music: - darkness_road_bpm165 - https://opengameart.org/content/darkness-roadremekeLevel 06 Music: - CleytonRX - Battle RPG Theme Var - https://opengameart.org/content/boss-battle-themeEnd of level screen: - lawdy lawd lawyers - https://opengameart.org/content/cc0-scrapsThrone Room Music: - rhythm garden - https://opengameart.org/content/rythm-garden-second-cruise-congusbongus-remixed

game.title: Museum Servivit
game.short_text: Join Angelo in his first day at the Servivit Museum

details.title: Museum Servivit
details.description:
Welcome to Museum Servivit! Join Angelo, a sprightly old man who recently started his new job here as a night keeper. However, this experience will prove to be pretty far from ordinary. Will you help him discover the terrible secret hiding in the Museum?
 


The game was made in one month during the GitHub Game Off Game Jam 2024, which ran from the 1st of November to the 1st of December 2024 and was based on the “Secret” theme. GitHub's game repository is here.

Gameplay
In Servivit Museum, the player must follow the Curator's instructions and care for the museum during Angelo's night shift. Sounds easy, right? What could go wrong?Move Angelo, close the museum, interact with the different artifacts to solve puzzles, and reveal the Museum's obscure secret. 

All the assets were created from scratch during GitHub Game Off Game Jam 2024. A special thanks to everyone who recently tested the game!
Soundtrack
https://bandcamp.com/EmbeddedPlayer/album=937416736/size=large/bgcol=181a1b/linkcol=056cc4/tracklist=false/artwork=small/transparent=true/

details.title: The Secret Funeral
details.description:
🌙
Inside a secret is still a secret.

Tell one secret and there are many more.
Game introduction:
The game is about some thoughts and feelings about death. 
A narrative visual novel with multiple choices and multiple endings. The flow is 5 minutes. 2 branches and 2 endings.

3 signs appear in the prophecy.
Waking up she solemnly takes her hat and crosses the diverging paths to attend a secret funeral.The depths of the paths, the passengers on the boat, the black river, the death in the cemetery...what kind of funeral is she going to?
To the secrets in our hearts that we have nowhere to tell.



Inspiration: 
When I was a freshman in high school, I took a leave of absence to go to a funeral, and when I came back to school at the end of the day, it was gym class, and the class happened to be in the playground. I was alone in my seat calming down. By the time everyone got out of class and returned to the classroom, my eyes were no longer red and swollen. No one knew what I had taken time off to do. I didn't dare say anything either. Death happened quietly.
story + art + dev -yutocomposer  - 亚涛
en-US - 小刺猬达芬奇


Let me know in the comments if you think anything about it, I'm about to start working on the next game featuring this girl in a hat!!

game.title: Secondhand
game.short_text: Henry thought he found the perfect couch. Until he stumbled into a cult.

details.title: Secondhand
details.description:
Henry thought he’d scored the deal of a lifetime when he found a free couch online—until he arrived at the seller's address...   What seemed like a simple pickup turns into a bizarre and eerie adventure when he stumbles upon a strange cult obsessed with secret handshakes.
Henry must navigate a series of increasingly bizarre challenges, each more twisted than the last. As the cult’s true motives slowly unravel, Henry must decide: Can he outwit the cult and find his way out, or will he become just another pawn in their bizarre rituals?Art: Juana Lourdes SotomayorMusic & Sound: José Tomás ContrerasCode: PenguinYeeWriting: Joaquín SchwarzFont: monogram by datagoblinChangelog:December 1st, 2024: Fixed some missing textures, added more lives to minigamesDecember 7th, 2024: Fixed critical issue that would crash the game, sorry if you experienced it!

game.title: Reid House
game.short_text: A psychiatrist hopes to get some insight into his patient's life by paying a visit to his now empty house.

details.title: Reid House
details.description:
From its sentinel up in the hill, the house watches the road from afar as its windows appear to blink.
A submission for Game Off 2024 — this year's theme was "secrets."

⚠︎ TW: Disturbing imagery and audio, a lot of cockroaches, animal death, swearing
Short point-and-click adventure where you walk around a rotting house. Inspired by H.P Lovecraft's "The Case of Charles Dexter Ward" and Mike Flanagan's adaptation of "The Haunting of Hill House." ~20 minutes of gameplay assuming you interact with every object.
This is my very first game ever; expect bugs. No pun intended. I may give this a complete post-jam remake sometime in the future. Who knows?
Made with Godot 4.3. Art made with Clip Studio Paint EX.
GITHUB REPOSITORY :: https://github.com/rubatozis/ReidHouse-GameOff-Entry
Report any issues in the comments, pretty please. They'll be annotated and fixed as soon as I'm able to.

KNOWN TROUBLES
Consider downloading the game for the best experience! The web version has some delay and some audio issues. Nothing game-breaking.
If you can't click the X in the dialogue box, try clicking it from the bottom right. This is an issue in other games and is probably just a thing to do with collision boxes acting a little stupid.
I've got two reports of the file being recognized as dangerous. I will try to look for a way to prevent this. Be patient!

CREDITS
✐⋆｡˚. Additional art by my friend Camusvast, made traditionally

details.title: Anomaly
details.description:
Cyberpunk 3rd person shooter - investigate anomaly within NeuroScape!

Controls

This is a game about a girl trapped in a hellish hotel . As the protagonist gets closer to the exit, she must face increasingly dark and horrifying demons that she needs to defeat to escape.

Search for clues
.
Find items to assemble the trap

game.title: Nocturne
game.short_text: Manage the night shift at a cyberpunk hotel where secret agents and unsuspecting guests collide.

details.title: Nocturne
details.description:
Nocturne is a narrative-driven puzzle game where you play as a receptionist in a cyberpunk hotel lobby. It might seem like an ordinary hotel, but Nocturne hides a secret in plain sight—it serves as a sanctuary for secret agents.

Each day, visitors arrive with stories to tell, and it’s up to you to decide whether they are on a mission, simply passing through, or perhaps lying to take you down. Failure is not an option—stay sharp and deduce everything carefully.
----------
Gameplay Highlights:
👥 Engaging Interactions: 
Meet a bunch of visitors with distinct personalities. Analyze their dialogue, appearance, and documents to find clues that match the day's code.
🕵️‍♂️ Agent Identification:
To confirm someone as an agent, ensure all parts of the code are revealed through their dialogue or documents or any other means. Partial matches won’t cut it!
🏨 High-Stakes Decisions:
Choose carefully—assign visitors either a standard room card or an agent-exclusive card based on your deductions. One wrong move could lead to something you don't want to know.
🌆 Atmospheric Immersion:
Dive into a detailed cyberpunk hotel setting, complete with neon-lit aesthetics, gritty interiors, and a moody soundtrack.
🔑 Multiple EndingsUnravel the story through multiple endings, including a secret one. Can you find it?
----------
Playing Notes:
This game is optimized to be played in desktop browser.
----------
About Us:
Nocturne is brought to you by Sunspoken Studio, a small indie game team with a passion for creating immersive experience.

game.title: Aurora
game.short_text: Short horror reflection about relationship with granny.

details.title: Aurora
details.description:
Hi Friend, 
We are pleased to present you our game project. It's a short spooky self-reflection regarding relationship with relatives and difficulties of maintaining contact with them. 
Plot
Aurora travels to the village to visit her grandmother. They used to be very close, but Aurora hasn't visited her grandmother in several years. Upon arriving at the house, Aurora discovers that her grandmother passed away a few days before she arrived. Missing her granddaughter and deprived of a final conversation, the grandmother's spirit couldn't rest. The house, absorbing its mistress's resentment, anger, and sadness, also changed. Aurora must either escape the cursed house or brave a final conversation with her grandmother.
Conception
In this game, you will need to explore the house within a limited amount of time, using a flashlight or adjusting your eyes to the darkness.  Not all items will be available immediately, and each significant interaction will consume your time. Some of your actions may upset the ghosts in the house, so think carefully before acting.
Controls
Use the left mouse button to move and interact with objects.Use the right mouse button to turn the flashlight on/off.
Our team
Igor Shapovalov - game designerTrisha Skarzgard - 2D artistInna Shinkareva - 2D artistLyudmila Bryzgalova - 2D artistYuliya Shchigareva - narrative designerVitaly Fesov - developerNadzeya Shenfeld - developerHelena Borka - video editorAlena Goncharenko - mentor

game.title: The Secret Scoffer of Saffron Walden
game.short_text: Competitive eating sim/shooter

details.title: The Secret Scoffer of Saffron Walden
details.description:
(WebGL runs fine but may take around 20 seconds to load)
2002, SAFFRON WALDEN, ESSEX, ENGLAND
You have lost your job. You can't tell Doris, your Disnae-obsessed, ex-wrestler wife, as she wants you to take her to Disnae land and insists you have a steady job to save for the trip. 
Luckily for you, you love scoffing, and Saffron Walden has become a culinary theme park, with food challenges all over the place offering CASH PRIZES to scoff down food as fast as you can. 
Beats working. So what are you waiting for? Get scoffing! Just don't tell Doris. Yet.
Made in one month for the Github GameOff 2024.
1 known minor issue: It is unlikely but possible to complete the walkies and then be killed if this happens at the same moment. This will load the scene outside the house but the completion of the walkies will be registered and you can proceed as  normal.

resultData.title: The Search for the Secret Sapphire

game.title: The Search for the Secret Sapphire
game.short_text: An adventure-puzzle game about searching a mansion for a jewel. There is definitely nothing else going on in this game.

details.title: The Search for the Secret Sapphire
details.description:
A point-and-click adventure puzzle game... with a twist...
Lost in a  haunted mansion without a hope of escape, the only way out is in. Will  you find the Secret Sapphire and cure the curse?  DEV'S NOTE: This assumes that you are able to  start the game. If the start-button breaks, the HELP BOT should be able  to assist you. That shouldn't happen though. Probably.

    SPOILER
The point-and-click adventure actually takes place inside of the menu of "The Search for the Secret Sapphire". Your goal is to fix the start button and finally get to play the game :)

Puzzle Hints
If you're struggling with some of the puzzles, here's a couple of hints to help you along :) 

    Username Puzzle Hint
Have a look around the main menu screen, I'm sure I must have credited myself with my username somewhere there...


    Password Puzzle Hint
There might be a useful TOOL in the menu somewhere that could help you find a clue for the password. Once you've found the clue, you might find some more information if you CLICK on everything, be it moving or STATIC. This puzzle could have been clearer, but I just spent so long looking at pictures of TURTLEs that I ran out of time...


    S Puzzle Hint
I've been working on another game called HammerMan. It's pretty basic, but something weird has happened, there's a character that showed up in the game that I didn't intend on being there... It's sort of shaped like a snake with legs??


    T1 Puzzle Hint
That HammerMan sure has a knack for getting in places he was never intended to... he's even able to break the edges of my screen and run on top of the windows on my desktop! 


    A Puzzle Hint
If there's one thing I love more than turtles, it's memes about turtles. If only there was a way to help out the turtle in the meme on my desktop... Maybe some other program on my computer can give me something that will help? (Make sure that you help the meme turtle completely, as it will give you a tool that's required to solve a later puzzle)


    R Puzzle Hint
I wonder where that pesky letter R got to... You might need to start thinking outside of (or rather, on top of) the box for this one...


    T2 Puzzle Hint
I find the best tools can be found on the fringes of the game world. Tools like these really change your perspective and allow you to zoom out and see the bigger picture. You might even find something mysterious in the void. Luckily for me, I'm able to remember secrets like these by leaving hints for them on stickynotes. 


    Finale Puzzle Hint
I'm afraid that you're at the mercy of the HELP BOT. They are immune to anything that is found within the game. Although... maybe there's something (or someone) from a DIFFERENT game that might be able to do some damage...


    Secret Sapphire Puzzle Hint I like turtles...
Controls: 
Interact / Pick Up Item / Use Held Item: Left ClickDrop Held Item: Right ClickSkip Dialogue: Left Click / TabPan Camera: Middle-Mouse / Ctrl+Left ClickZoom Camera: Scroll Wheel / Ctrl+ & Ctrl-Return Home: EnterCheat Codes:  ↑  ↓ ← →Hammer Man: ↑  ↓ ← →  Spacebar

game.title: S.C.A.L.P.
game.short_text: Can you unravel the secret of your origin?

details.title: S.C.A.L.P.
details.description:
Background:
In the early 1980s, a group of scientists, medical researchers, and entrepreneurs joined forces to create an ambitious initiative — S.C.A.L.P. Lab (Scientific Center for Advanced Lifeform Projects). They aimed to unlock the mysteries of life and improve human health, but from the very beginning, their methods raised numerous questions. Their ambitious goal was to create new forms of life. However, over time, their pursuit of progress began to cross ethical lines.
Gameplay:
You have escaped from your chamber, but... who are you? Your goal is to reach the exit of your current location without getting caught by the guards armed with electroshock batons, while picking the right keys for the necessary doors and simultaneously collecting as many secret documents as possible that will help you piece together both your past and the past of the lab.


USP:
• Procedural generation: Experience a sense of uncertainty with each playthrough, as the layout of all rooms and corridors will differ from the previous attempt.
• Mystery of origin: To uncover the character's backstory and, most importantly, its appearance, you will need to reach the end of the level while collecting items to explore everything in the archive.
• Visual style: The limitation on the number of colors used allows for the creation of a dark atmosphere while also highlighting important areas for the player where these colors do appear.
Control:
WASD – movement
SPACE – jump
SHIFT + WASD – run
CTRL + WASD – crouch
E/MMB– interact/pick up items 
F/LMB – throw item 
Q/RMB – put down item
Team:
Valentin Savinov – Mentor
Nikita Chumak – Game Designer
Alina Karavaeva– Unity Developer
Andrey Spirin – Unity Developer
Kseniya Zavelitskaya – 3D Artist
Saveliy Kislyakov – 3D Artist
Oleg Shamborkin – 2D Artist
Vladislav Astapenko – Narrative Designer
Yana Moshnina – Motion Designer//// RU RU ////
Предыстория:
В начале 1980-х годов группа ученых, медицинских исследователей и предпринимателей объединила свои усилия для создания амбициозной инициативы — S.C.A.L.P. Lab (Scientific Center for Advanced Lifeform Projects). Они стремились раскрыть тайны жизни и улучшить здоровье человечества, но с самого начала их методы вызывали множество вопросов. Их амбициозная цель заключалась в создании новых форм жизни. Однако со временем их стремление к прогрессу начало переходить границы этики.
Геймплей:
Вы выбрались на свободу из своей колбы, но... кто вы? Ваша цель: не попавшись в руки охранников, вооружённых электрошокерами, добраться до выхода из текущей локации, подбирая правильные ключи к нужным дверям и параллельно собирая как можно больше секретных документов, которые позволят вам собрать картину как своего прошлого, так и прошлого лаборатории.
USP:
Процедурная генерация: испытай чувство неопределённости при каждом запуске, ведь расположение всех комнат и коридоров будет отличаться от предыдущей попытки.
Тайна происхождения: для того, чтобы узнать историю персонажа и, главное, его внешний вид, придётся, собирая коллекционные предметы, дойти до конца уровня, чтобы изучить всё в архиве.
Визуальный стиль: ограничение в количестве используемых цветов позволяет как создать мрачную атмосферу, так и выделить для игрока важные области, где эти цвета всё же имеются.
Управление:
WASD – движение
SPACE – прыжок
SHIFT + WASD – бег
CTRL + WASD – красться
E\СКМ – взаимодействие\подбор предметов
F\ЛКМ – бросить предмет
Q\ПКМ – положить предмет
Команда:
Валентин Савинов – Наставник
Никита Чумак – Game Designer
Алина Караваева – Unity Developer
Андрей Спирин – Unity Developer
Ксения Завелитская – 3D Artist
Савелий Кисляков – 3D Artist
Олег Шамборкин – 2D Artist
Владислав Астапенко – Narrative Designer
Яна Мошнина – Motion DesignerDownload, unzip, run the executable exe file.

details.title: Erase the Secret
details.description:
Welcome to Erase the Secret! In this game, you play as a secret agent who must prevent a secret from getting out.
Press W, A, S, and D to move. Press space to use the Mind-Erase-3000 to make people forget the secret. Left click to dash in the direction of your mouse. Right click to teleport to where your mouse is. Be careful though, all of these abilities have to recharge!
People with exclamation mark speech bubbles are aware of the secret! You have to erase all their memories to win! Be quick, because they will spread the secret to other people around them! As your score increases, more people will know the secret when the round starts.
People with a white outline are able to destroy the organization if the find out the secret! If they find out, you lose!
This game was made for the Github Game Off 2024! The Github repository can be found at https://github.com/Luke-Parker1/Game-Off-2024.
The music was made by Matthew Pablo under the Creative Commons license at opengameart.org.

game.title: ørlǫg: The Moment Fate Stalled
game.short_text: Unrevealed secrets of Orloj and human history

details.title: ørlǫg: The Moment Fate Stalled
details.description:
“What shapes the course of humanity? A decision, a clock, or a dance?”
- · - · -
Intro
In 1974, I arrived in Prague to attend a modern SF Art exhibition. However, I found myself short on small change after forgetting to exchange my currency for koruna. When suddenly, a mysterious, beautiful girl came to my aid. By chance, we met again later that evening in a bar. She used me as an excuse to escape from someone, calling me her friend, and we ended up boarding a midnight train together.

During the journey, when she learned that I was a surrealist painter, she revealed that her family was responsible for overseeing the “Prague Astronomical Clock (orloj),” which determines the course of human evolution. But in truth, its function was damaged during the 1945 shelling, leaving humanity’s future uncertain.

She also mentioned that encounters between people are never truly random—they are the result of something arranged, perhaps by fate. She spoke of fate with a strange mix of familiarity and resistance.

- · - · -
Design Background
ørlǫg is a narrative-driven experience told from a third-party perspective, weaving the surreal and the profound into an unforgettable journey.
The story follows a celebrated modern SF artist, now hollowed by the weight of their success, as they encounter a mysterious girl on a quiet night. She introduces herself as the embodiment of Time and History. Every century, she chooses an artist to determine the future of humanity.

Guided by this enigmatic figure, the artist embarks on a dreamlike odyssey to wind the clock of history, making a choice that will define the fate of the world. The ritual culminates in an otherworldly dance of the Vitruvian figure—a symbolic performance tying art, humanity, and destiny into one.
Made by  CYT & UFEN

details.title: Shaki Shaki Island
details.description:

game.title: Ellie Dee`s Adventure
game.short_text: Adventure game where you control two little light bulbs, using the whole light spectrum to find secrets!

details.title: Ellie Dee`s Adventure
details.description:
Solo/Local co-op game where you take control of two little light bulbs. Explore and escape the attic while using the whole light spectrum and discover secrets.
Warning! CTRL + W will reload the page, use FULLSCREEN to avoid this.

Session lenght: 10 min

Made solo in 30 days for GitHub's 2024 Game Off Jam.
________________________
Credits:
UV Drawings by KylleyInocence
All audio purchased thru Imphenzia
https://imphenzia.com/

details.title: The Shard
details.description:
-ENG-
A monster, a small shard of a mirror in the hand, and only one goal – to save their child. But what secrets does this place hold?
Control:
WASD - Movement
CTRL+WASD -  Crouch
SPACE - Mirror
Mouse - Hand position 
LBM - Mirror rotation
Team:
Ivan Narsky - MENTOR
Tsoy Olga - NARRATIVE DESIGN 
Artem Apanasenko- GAME DESIGN 
Artem Marichev - 3D ARTIST
Evgeny Semenov - 3D ARTIST

Ashot Grigoryan - 3D ARTIST 

Sofia Voronina - 2D ARTIST

Vladimir Belov - VIDEO MAKER

Ivan Titov - UNITY DEVELOPER
Arkady Alaverdyan - UNITY DEVELOPER
Vlad Zaytsev - UNITY DEVELOPER

-RUS-
Монстр, маленький осколок зеркала в руке и лишь одна цель - спасти своего ребенка.  Но какие секреты хранит это место?
Управление:
WASD - Движение
CTRL+WASD -  Присесть

SPACE - Зеркало

Mouse - Положение руки

LBM - Вращение зеркала
Команда: 
Иван Нарский - MENTOR
Ольга Цой - NARRATIVE DESIGN
Артём Апанасенко - GAME DESIGN
Артем Маричев - 3D ARTIST

Ашот Григорян - 3D ARTIST 
Софья Воронина - 2D ARTIST
Владимир Белов - VIDEO MAKER
Иван Титов - UNITY DEVELOPER
Аркадий Алавердян - UNITY DEVELOPER
Владислав Зайцев - UNITY DEVELOPER

game.title: If Trees Could Talk
game.short_text: A game focused on sharing messages

details.title: If Trees Could Talk
details.description:
Time capsule of a messaging game in a cozy environment> INFOThis game was intended to run forever. All messages posted are now stored locally, the online functionality was removed. Thank you for 542 messages posted between December 2024 and January 2025.
> LEAVE YOUR MARK
Post anonymous messages in a shared, persistant world. Let you words linger for others to discover, even if you moved on.
> HOW TO PLAY

Drop a message, take a seat, listen to music. Return when you feel like.
> INFO

This is a calm, reflective experience unfolding over time. Play at you own pace, leave a mark, take a break, come back later.Simply extract the .zip and run the .exe file. Alternatively use the itch.io app

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
